description: Research-suite hooks for research-spark 8-stage pipeline gating (prompt-based artifact checks) and scientific-review integrity tracking (command-based logging).

hooks.prompt: Check the subagent transcript. If the agent is NOT research-spark-orchestrator or scientific-review, respond only with 'N/A' and stop. Otherwise: for research-spark, verify a stage artifact is present (Stage 1-8 marker '## Stage N:' or 'artifact:') covering the expected output (problem statement, falsifiable claim, pre-registration, experimental plan, analysis plan, results, discussion, or manuscript), named per convention. For scientific-review, verify the referee report has all required sections (summary, strengths, weaknesses, major concerns, minor concerns, recommendation). Report any missing artifacts so the orchestrator can regenerate them before advancing.
